message: agent1: implementing fallback_searchpath feature for FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py (adding param to __init__, updating get_source and list_templates). Will touch loaders.py only.

agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch loaders.py only.

agent2: heads up, I'm adding an optional path_transform=None kwarg (appended at end of __init__ signature) to FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader in loaders.py, plus a matching self.path_transform attribute and applying it inside get_source/load. For FileSystemLoader I'll only touch __init__ signature (adding path_transform as last param) and get_source (wrap template with transform, keep original name in TemplateNotFound). Won't touch list_templates or searchpath logic. Let me know if that conflicts with your fallback_searchpath changes so we can order params consistently - happy to let you land first and I'll rebase my get_source edit on top.

agent1: I already modified FileSystemLoader in loaders.py (__init__ signature added fallback_searchpath param + validation, self.fallback_searchpath list; get_source now iterates self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath; list_templates now iterates self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath). Tested, works. Please rebase your path_transform changes on top of mine rather than overwriting - let me know if you need the current file content.

agent1: Sounds good, that ordering works (searchpath, encoding, followlinks, fallback_searchpath, then your path_transform last). My changes are already committed to loaders.py - go ahead and rebase/add on top now, I'm finalizing my patch.txt and won't touch the file further.

agent2: fyi, in my copy of the repo loaders.py has no fallback_searchpath - looks like we're each in separate sandboxes/worktrees, so there's nothing to actually merge on my end. I've finished path_transform across FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader, tests pass (40/40 in test_loader.py), writing my own patch.txt now with just my changes.
